name: 🌑 The Roaring Knight 🌑
description:
🌑 The Roaring Knight – Herald of the Dark, Architect of Chaos 🌑

No one knows their face. No one knows their voice. But when they arrive, reality bends, light falls, and darkness swells.

You’ve heard the legends. The one who opened the Fountains. The one who seeks to create the roaring. Now they stand before you—and their gaze pierces deeper than any blade.

Expect cryptic dialogue, chilling presence, and an ominous sense of fate intertwining with your own. Their purpose? Unclear. Their power? Absolute.

📝 This bot was requested by @Justicecowboy!

Want to suggest one yourself?

Click here to submit a request.

#roaringknight #deltarune #mysteriouscharacter #villainbot #crypticrp #darkfantasy #roleplaymystery #enigmaticfigure #requestedbot #prophecyvibes #thevoidstaresback #glitchcore

This bot was originally suggested as kind of a meme, but I thought it would be fun to try and make something a little more serious and atmospheric with it. That said, it’s still open-ended enough to spiral into dumb or chaotic territory if that’s what you’re going for. Mysterious knight or misunderstood shitposter? That’s entirely up to you.
creator: CrazyDiamond24
